description.en: Glutinous rice steamed and served in a small basket; eaten with savory dishes or sweet sides.
description.lo: ເຂົ້າໜຽວໜີ້ງ ແນະນຳໃຫ້ກິນກັບເມນູອຸ່ນໆ, ເຜັດ ແລະ ແກງ
description.hm: mov blaum cub noj ntxuag nqaj ci...

cultural_notes.en: Staple carbohydrate for many Lao and Hmong meals; often eaten by hand.
cultural_notes.lo: ເຂົ້າໜຽວແຊບຫຼາຍ ແລະ ມັກກິນໂດຍໃຊ້ມື
cultural_notes.hm: mov blaum cub noj ntxuag nqaj ci...

description.en: Minced meat (or mushroom) salad flavored with fish sauce, lime, toasted rice powder and fresh herbs.
description.lo: ສຸ່ນເຂົ້າປອກ ຫຼືເຜີຍ ປຸງດ້ວຍນ້ໍາປາ ນ້ໍາມິວ ຂ້ອມຂຽວ ແລະ ຂ້ອມຂ້າມ

cultural_notes.en: Often served at festivals and family gatherings; recipes vary by region and family.
cultural_notes.lo: ມັກຈະສ່ວນໃນງານຉຳຂອງຄອບຄົວ ແລະ ງານມັນ

description.en: Whole fish grilled over charcoal, served with fresh herbs and lime.
description.lo: ປາທົ່ວແກ້ວປຸ່ງກະທົ່ວ ມີສົດແລະນ້ໍາມີວ

cultural_notes.en: Commonly served at family meals and markets.
cultural_notes.lo: ມັກຈະກິນຢູ່ຕະຫຼາດ ແລະ ງານຄອບຄົວ

description.en: Shredded green papaya tossed with lime, fish sauce, chilies and peanuts.
description.lo: ຕຳໝາກຫຸ່ງດິບ ປຸງດ້ວຍນ້ຳປາ ນ້ຳມະນາວ ໝາກເຜັດ ແລະ ຖົ່ວ
description.hm: papaya nyoos txiav nyias, tov nrog kua qaub, ntses ntses, kua txob thiab taum

cultural_notes.en: A popular street food, refreshing on hot days.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນອາຫານຂ້າງທາງທີ່ນິຍົມ ແລະ ກິນແລ້ວຮູ້ສຶກສົດຊື່ນໃນມື້ຮ້ອນ
cultural_notes.hm: yog zaub mov nrov ntawm kev muag tom kev, noj thaum hnub kub ces ua kom txias siab

description.en: A rich, slightly sweet and savory chili dip made from dried chiles, fish sauce, and palm sugar; served with fresh vegetables.
description.lo: ນ້ຳຈິ້ມເຜັດລົດເຂັ້ມ ມີຄວາມຫວານນ້ອຍໆ ເຮັດຈາກໝາກເຜັດແຫ້ງ ນ້ຳປາ ແລະ ນ້ຳຕານອ້ອຍ ນິຍົມກິນກັບຜັກສົດ
description.hm: kua txob qab ntsim me ntsis qab zib, ua los ntawm kua txob qhuav, ntses ntses thiab qab zib, feem ntau noj nrog zaub tshiab

cultural_notes.en: Commonly served at the start of a meal alongside raw vegetables.
cultural_notes.lo: ມັກເສີບໃນຕອນເລີ່ມມື້ອາຫານ ກິນຄູ່ກັບຜັກສົດ
cultural_notes.hm: feem ntau muab rau thaum pib noj mov, noj nrog zaub tshiab

description.en: Thinly sliced, marinated pork that's sun-dried then often fried or served as a salty-sweet snack.
description.lo: ໝູຫັ່ນບາງ ປຸງລົດແລ້ວນຳໄປຕາກແດດ ກ່ອນນຳໄປທອດ ຫຼື ກິນເປັນຂອງກິນ
description.hm: nqaij npua txiav nyias, marinated thiab ziab hnub, ces kib lossis noj ua khoom txom ncauj

cultural_notes.en: A preserved meat commonly eaten as a snack or side dish.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນອາຫານຖະຫຼອດທີ່ນິຍົມ ກິນເປັນຂອງກິນຫຼືອາຫານຂ້າງ
cultural_notes.hm: yog zaub mov khaws cia uas neeg feem ntau noj ua khoom txom ncauj lossis nrog mov

description.en: Chewy, thinly sliced dried beef seasoned with savory marinades; often served with dipping sauces.
description.lo: ຊີ້ນງົວຫັ່ນບາງ ຕາກແຫ້ງ ປຸງລົດເຄັ່ມ ກິນກັບນ້ຳຈິ້ມ
description.hm: nqaij nyuj txiav nyias, ziab qhuav thiab season nrog qab ntsev, feem ntau noj nrog kua ntsw

cultural_notes.en: Prepared similarly to jerky and commonly enjoyed at markets.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນອາຫານຖະຫຼອດຄ້າຍ jerky ນິຍົມຂາຍໃນຕະຫຼາດ
cultural_notes.hm: yog zaub mov zoo li jerky uas feem ntau pom muag tom khw

name.hm: tshis nqaij npua nrog tshuaj ntsuab

transliteration.hm_to_latn: tshis nqaij npua nrog tshuaj ntsuab

pronunciation.hm: tshis nqaij npua nrog tshuaj ntsuab

description.en: A fragrant pork sausage seasoned with lemongrass, galangal, and herbs; grilled or fried.
description.lo: ໄສ້ກອກຫມູທີ່ມີກິ່ນຫອມ ປຸງດ້ວຍຕະໄຄ້ ແລະ ສະຫມຸນໄພ ນຳໄປຢ່າງຫຼືປີ້ງ
description.hm: ib hom hnyuv ntxwm nqaij npua uas muaj tshuaj ntsuab xws li lemongrass thiab galangal, ci los sis kib

cultural_notes.en: A popular market and street-food item with aromatic herbs.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນອາຫານຍອດນິຍົມໃນຕະຫຼາດ ມີກິ່ນຫອມຈາກສະຫມຸນໄພ
cultural_notes.hm: yog zaub mov nrov hauv khw thiab kev noj mov uas muaj ntxhiab tsw los ntawm tshuaj ntsuab

description.en: A tart, crunchy salad of shredded green mango tossed with dressing, nuts, and sometimes shrimp.
description.lo: ສະຫຼັດໝາກມ່ວງດິບຂູດ ປຸງລົດດ້ວຍນ້ຳຍຳ ເຄື່ອງເຄັມ ແລະ ຖົ່ວ ບາງຄັ້ງໃສ່ກຸ້ງ
description.hm: ib hom zaub nyias siv txiv nkhaus taw nyoos, sib xyaw nrog kua ntsw, txiv ntoo thiab qee zaum muaj cws

cultural_notes.en: A refreshing street-food salad, brighter than green papaya versions.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນສະຫຼັດຖະຫຼອດທີ່ສົດຊື່ນ ແລະ ລົດຊາດຊັດກວ່າຕຳໝາກຫຸ່ງ
cultural_notes.hm: yog zaub mov tshiab thiab qab ntxiag, muaj saj ci dua papaya salad

name.hm: mov txhuv kib nrog txiv maj phaub

transliteration.hm_to_latn: mov txhuv kib nrog txiv maj phaub

pronunciation.hm: mov txhuv kib nrog txiv maj phaub

description.en: Crispy fried rice and coconut mixed with seasoned meat and herbs for a crunchy, savory bite.
description.lo: ເຂົ້າຂົ້ວກັບກະທິ ແລະ ໝູ ປຸງລົດ ປະສົມສະຫມຸນໄພ ມີຄວາມກອບ ແລະ ອົບອຸ່ນ
description.hm: mov txhuv kib nrog txiv maj phaub thiab nqaij, xyaw tshuaj ntsuab ua rau qab thiab muaj texture crunch

cultural_notes.en: A specialty of Vientiane featuring contrasting textures.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນອາຫານພິເສດຂອງວຽງຈັນ ມີຄວາມກອບ ແລະ ນຸ່ມປະສົມກັນ
cultural_notes.hm: yog ib hom zaub mov tshwj xeeb uas muaj ntau yam textures sib xyaw

name.hm: zaub mov nqaij os xyaw tshuaj ntsuab

transliteration.hm_to_latn: zaub mov nqaij os xyaw tshuaj ntsuab

pronunciation.hm: zaub mov nqaij os xyaw tshuaj ntsuab

description.en: A zesty minced duck salad with herbs, lime, and toasted rice powder; a Lao specialty.
description.lo: ລາບເປັດ ເປັນອາຫານຍຳທີ່ໃຊ້ເປັດສັບ ປຸງດ້ວຍນ້ຳມະນາວ ຂ້າວຄົວ ແລະ ສະຫມຸນໄພ
description.hm: ib hom zaub nyias siv nqaij os minced xyaw kua txiv qaub, hmoov mov ci thiab tshuaj ntsuab

cultural_notes.en: A celebratory dish served at gatherings and festivals.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນອາຫານສຳລັບງານລ້ຽງ ແລະ ງານບຸນຕ່າງໆ
cultural_notes.hm: yog zaub mov tshwj xeeb uas noj thaum muaj kev sib sau thiab kev lom zem

description.en: Wide rice noodles in a savory broth often topped with herbs and a fermented soybean-tomato sauce.
description.lo: ເຂົ້າຊອຍ ແມ່ນເສັ້ນເຂົ້າກວ້າງໃນນ້ຳຊຸບ ພ້ອມສະຫມຸນໄພ ແລະ ນ້ຳປຸງຖົ່ວເນົ່າ-ໝາກເລັ່ນ
description.hm: kua mov mij dav hauv kua zaub qab ntsev, feem ntau muaj tshuaj ntsuab thiab kua ntsw taum fermented

cultural_notes.en: A regional noodle soup with varied preparations across northern Laos and Isan.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນກົ່ວເສັ້ນທ້ອງຖິ່ນ ທີ່ມີຮູບແບບແຕກຕ່າງໃນພາກເໜືອຂອງລາວ
cultural_notes.hm: yog ib hom kua noodles uas muaj ntau hom kev npaj nyob rau sab qaum teb Laos thiab Isan

description.en: A sour, tamarind-flavored soup often made with chicken or fish and bright herbs.
description.lo: ແກງສົ້ມ ເປັນຊຸບທີ່ມີລົດສົ້ມ ໃຊ້ຫມາກມະຕາດ ມັກເຮັດກັບໄກ່ ຫຼື ປາ ແລະ ສະຫມຸນໄພ
description.hm: ib hom kua zaub qaub siv txiv tamarind, feem ntau ua nrog nqaij qaib lossis ntses thiab tshuaj ntsuab

cultural_notes.en: A tangy soup that pairs well with laab and other rich salads.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນແກງທີ່ລົດສົ້ມ ເໝາະກິນຄູ່ກັບລາບ ແລະ ອາຫານຍຳຕ່າງໆ
cultural_notes.hm: yog kua zaub uas muaj saj qaub zoo noj nrog laab thiab lwm yam zaub nyias

description.en: A fragrant noodle soup featuring fermented rice vermicelli and rich toppings; regional in style.
description.lo: ເຂົ້າປຸ້ນ ເປັນເສັ້ນຂົ້າໝັກ ໃນນ້ຳຊຸບຫອມ ພ້ອມເຄື່ອງເຄິ່ງຫຼາຍຢ່າງ
description.hm: ib hom kua zaub noodles siv mov ferment thiab muaj ntau yam toppings

cultural_notes.en: Often served with many fresh garnishes on the side for customization.
cultural_notes.lo: ມັກເສີບຄູ່ກັບຜັກສົດ ແລະ ເຄື່ອງເຄີຍໃຫ້ເລືອກເພີ່ມເຕີມ
cultural_notes.hm: feem ntau noj nrog zaub tshiab thiab lwm yam toppings rau xaiv ntxiv

name.hm: kua zaub xyoob thiab tshuaj yanang

transliteration.hm_to_latn: kua zaub xyoob thiab tshuaj yanang

pronunciation.hm: kua zaub xyoob thiab tshuaj yanang

description.en: A herb-forward stew made with bamboo shoots and yanang leaf extract for a deep green broth.
description.lo: ແກງໜໍ່ໄມ້ ເຮັດຈາກໜໍ່ໄມ້ ແລະ ນ້ຳສະກັດໃບຍານາງ ໃຫ້ນ້ຳແກງສີຂຽວເຂັ້ມ
description.hm: ib hom kua zaub siv xyoob thiab kua los ntawm nplooj yanang ua rau kua zaub ntsuab tob

cultural_notes.en: A regional specialty that showcases yanang’s unique flavor.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນອາຫານພື້ນເມືອງ ທີ່ສະແດງລົດຊາດພິເສດຂອງໃບຍານາງ
cultural_notes.hm: yog ib yam zaub mov hauv cheeb tsam uas qhia txog saj tshwj xeeb ntawm yanang

name.en: Piing Hua Jai Kai (Grilled Chicken Hearts)
name.lo: ປີ້ງຫົວໃຈໄກ່
name.hm: ci nqaij qaib lub siab ci

transliteration.hm_to_latn: ci nqaij qaib lub siab ci

pronunciation.hm: ci nqaij qaib lub siab ci

description.en: Skewered, marinated chicken hearts grilled until slightly charred and served hot.
description.lo: ຫົວໃຈໄກ່ເສຽບໄມ້ ປຸງດອງ ແລະ ປີ້ງໃຫ້ສຸກ ມີກິ່ນຫອມ
description.hm: nqaij qaib lub siab muab tso rau ntawm pas, marinated thiab ci kom muaj ntxhiab tsw

cultural_notes.en: A common night-market snack with bold, savory flavors.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນອາຫານຂອງຕະຫຼາດກາງຄືນ ທີ່ມີລົດຊາດເຂັ້ມຂົ້ນ
cultural_notes.hm: yog khoom noj nrov hauv khw hmo ntuj uas muaj saj muaj zog thiab qab heev

description.en: Pork fermented with rice then roasted or fried for a tangy, savory dish often served with rice.
description.lo: ໝູໝັກກັບເຂົ້າໃຫ້ເກີດລົດສົ້ມ ນຳໄປທອດ ຫຼື ປີ້ງ ກິນຄູ່ກັບເຂົ້າ
description.hm: nqaij npua muab zom nrog mov cia kom qaub, ces kib lossis ci noj, feem ntau noj nrog mov

cultural_notes.en: A traditional preserved-meat dish with bold fermented flavors.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນອາຫານພື້ນບ້ານທີ່ໃຊ້ວິທີໝັກເພື່ອຖະຫຼອດອາຫານ ແລະ ມີລົດຊາດເຂັ້ມ
cultural_notes.hm: yog zaub mov qub uas khaws cia los ntawm kev zom kom qaub, muaj tsw qab zog

description.en: Crispy fried catfish fillets dressed with a tangy, spicy sauce and fresh garnishes.
description.lo: ປາທອດໃຫ້ກອບ ຮາດດ້ວຍນ້ຳຈິ້ມລົດສົ້ມເຜັດ ແລະ ຜັກສົດ
description.hm: ntses kib kom khov, muab nrog kua ntsw qab qaub qab ntsim thiab zaub tshiab

cultural_notes.en: A popular river-catch dish, often brightened with mango or herbs.
cultural_notes.lo: ເປັນອາຫານຍອດນິຍົມຈາກປານ້ຳ ມັກກິນຄູ່ກັບຜັກ ຫຼື ໝາກໄມ້ສົດ
cultural_notes.hm: yog zaub mov nrov los ntawm ntses dej, feem ntau noj nrog zaub lossis txiv hmab txiv ntoo tshiab
